sources.title: AI Agents in Healthcare Market Size & Growth Forecast to 2030
sources.claim: AI Agents in Healthcare market valued at $0.76B in 2024, $1.11B in 2025, projected to grow at 44.1% CAGR through 2030 to reach $6.92B.

sources.title: AI In Healthcare Market Size To Reach $505.59Bn By 2033
sources.claim: Broader AI in healthcare market was $36.67B in 2025, growing at 38.90% CAGR to reach $505.59B by 2033. 2021 market was ~$11B.

sources.title: Agentic AI in Healthcare Market to Grow at 45.6% CAGR till 2035
sources.claim: Agentic AI in Healthcare market valued at $0.79B in 2025, growing to $1.14B in 2026, projected to reach $33.66B by 2035 at 45.6% CAGR.

sources.title: Abridge Secures $300M Series E Led by a16z to Pioneer a New Paradigm of Care Intelligence
sources.claim: Abridge raised $300M Series E led by Andreessen Horowitz and Khosla Ventures, reaching $5.3B valuation. Company to support 50M+ medical conversations in 2025, serving 55 specialties in 28 languages across 150+ health systems.

sources.title: Abridge raises $300 million, pushing health AI deal-making to new heights
sources.claim: Abridge hit $117M in contracted annual recurring revenue as of Q1 2025. Ambient scribes as a category generated $600M in ARR in 2025, representing a 2.4x year-over-year increase.

sources.title: Hippocratic AI lands $126M series C to expand patient-facing AI agents
sources.claim: Hippocratic AI secured $126M Series C, boosting valuation to $3.5B. Company has signed partnerships with 50+ large health systems, payers, and pharma clients, building 1,000 use cases for patient-facing healthcare AI agents.

sources.title: US Digital Health Funding Q1 2026: AI, Mega-Rounds, and Market Dominance
sources.claim: Q1 2026 saw $5.34B in digital health funding across 105 deals, with AI startups capturing 60% of all rounds — up from 37% in 2024. The U.S. captured 76% of global digital health funding.

sources.title: How AI Agents and Tech Will Transform Health Care in 2026
sources.claim: BCG documents healthcare AI agent use cases and projects 2026 as the year of enterprise-scale deployment, with autonomous agents moving from pilots to operational infrastructure.

sources.title: Ambient AI Tool Adoption in US Hospitals and Associated Factors
sources.claim: Ambient AI tools were adopted by nearly two-thirds of US hospitals on Epic EHR systems in 2025, with higher adoption at larger, not-for-profit hospitals with higher workloads.

sources.title: Top healthcare AI trends in 2026
sources.claim: Healthcare Dive documents the 2026 top trends including ambient AI, AI agents, and the shift from experimentation to enterprise-scale execution.

sources.title: Healthcare AI Regulation 2026: New Compliance Requirements Every Provider Must Know
sources.claim: Documents 2026 compliance requirements including FDA QMSR update aligning with ISO 13485:2016, state disclosure laws (Texas TRAIGA), and HIPAA BAA requirements for AI vendors. Over 250 healthcare AI bills introduced in 34+ states by mid-2025.

sources.title: Introducing Amazon Connect Health: Agentic AI for healthcare, built for the people who deliver it
sources.claim: AWS launched Amazon Connect Health in Q1 2026 — purpose-built agentic AI for healthcare call centers and care coordination, with HIPAA-compliant architecture.

sources.title: AI Agent Trends in Healthcare & Life Sciences 2026
sources.claim: Google Cloud documents healthcare AI agent trends including MedLM/Gemini Health partnerships with HCA Healthcare and Highmark Health.

sources.title: Ambient AI in Healthcare 2025: From Commoditization to Transformation
sources.claim: Specialty-specific ambient AI achieves higher note accuracy in dermatology, psychiatry, and orthopedics than general-purpose models trained primarily on primary care data.
sources.note: Source is a competitor company blog — treat as directionally accurate but commercially motivated

sources.title: Healthcare AI in 2026: Market Growth, Use Cases, and Outlook
sources.claim: AI in healthcare market projected to reach $50–56B in 2026, up from $36.67B in 2025.

sources.title: AI in Healthcare: Investment Trends, Opportunities & Market Growth 2026
sources.claim: 54% of digital health investment in 2025 went to AI-enabled companies, up from 37% in 2024. Healthcare AI startups claimed 6 of 11 AI unicorns created in Q1 2025.

unverified_claims.claim: Microsoft Nuance DAX Copilot holds ~35% of enterprise ambient AI deployments
unverified_claims.note: No public market share breakdown available; this is an internal estimate based on reported 500+ health system deployments vs. total U.S. hospital count. [unverified]
Widely cited figure; sourced from AAMC 2024 physician shortage report, but specific future projections carry model uncertainty. [partially verified]
